questions.text: Which dance form originated in Tamil Nadu?
questions.explanation: Bharatanatyam is a classical dance form from Tamil Nadu.

questions.text: Kathak is a form of classical Indian dance.
questions.explanation: Yes, Kathak is one of the eight classical Indian dance forms.

questions.text: The Taj Mahal was built by which Mughal emperor?
questions.explanation: Shah Jahan commissioned the Taj Mahal as a mausoleum for his wife Mumtaz Mahal.

questions.text: Match musical instruments with their origin:
questions.explanation: These instruments have distinct cultural origins.

questions.text: Which city in India was named 'City of Music' by UNESCO?
questions.explanation: Gwalior was designated as a UNESCO Creative City of Music in 2019.

questions.text: Madhubani is a traditional Indian art form from Bihar.
questions.explanation: Madhubani (Mithila) painting is a traditional art form from Bihar and Mithila region.

questions.text: Which of these are classical Indian dances? (Select all correct)
questions.explanation: All except Hip-hop are recognized classical dances of India.

questions.text: Assertion: Indian classical music has a complex rhythm system. Reason: Taal forms the rhythmic foundation.
questions.explanation: Both statements are correct; Taal is fundamental to Indian classical music.

questions.text: The Monalisa painting is in which museum?
questions.explanation: The Mona Lisa by Leonardo da Vinci is housed in the Louvre Museum, Paris.
Michelangelo sculpted the iconic marble statue 'David' in the early 1500s.
